5.0.short_description: Wall ID. If not specified, then the next available ID is used

keywords.description: Wall ID

keywords.name: wall.generate.name
keywords.description: Wall name

keywords.name: wall.generate.box
keywords.description: Generate a closed box

keywords.name: wall.generate.circle
keywords.description: Generate a closed circle in 2D

keywords.name: wall.generate.circle.radius
keywords.description: Radius of the circle that is 1

keywords.name: wall.generate.circle.resolution
keywords.description: Resolution of the facets

keywords.name: wall.generate.cone
keywords.description: Generate a cone in 3D

keywords.name: wall.generate.cone.base
keywords.description: Position of the base of the cone (i

keywords.name: wall.generate.cone.cap
keywords.description: Indicate the inclusion status of the end caps

keywords.name: wall.generate.cone.height
keywords.description: Height of the cone

keywords.name: wall.generate.cone.onewall
keywords.description: Specify that the end caps and side of the cone (if all created) belong to a single wall

keywords.name: wall.generate.cone.radius
keywords.description: Radius of the cone

keywords.name: wall.generate.cone.resolution
keywords.description: Resolution of the edges of the cone ends

keywords.name: wall.generate.cylinder
keywords.description: Generate a cylinder in 3D

keywords.name: wall.generate.cylinder.base
keywords.description: Position of the base of the cylinder (i

keywords.name: wall.generate.cylinder.cap
keywords.description: Indicate the inclusion status of the end caps

keywords.name: wall.generate.cylinder.height
keywords.description: Height of the cylinder

keywords.name: wall.generate.cylinder.onewall
keywords.description: Specify that the end caps and side of the cylinder (if all created) belong to a single wall

keywords.name: wall.generate.cylinder.radius
keywords.description: Radius of the cylinder, or the distance from the axis of symmetry to the side

keywords.name: wall.generate.cylinder.resolution
keywords.description: Resolution of the edges of the cylinder ends

keywords.name: wall.generate.disk
keywords.description: Generate a disk in 3D

keywords.name: wall.generate.disk.ddir
keywords.description: Dip direction of the disk in degrees as measured in a clockwise fashion from the positive y -axis in the range [0,360]

keywords.name: wall.generate.disk.position
keywords.description: Position of the center of the disk that is the origin by default

keywords.name: wall.generate.disk.radius
keywords.description: Radius of the disk that is 1

keywords.name: wall.generate.disk.resolution
keywords.description: Resolution of the disk edges

keywords.name: wall.generate.plane
keywords.description: Generate a plane wall that spans the entire domain and is truncated at the domain boundaries

keywords.name: wall.generate.plane.ddir
keywords.description: Dip direction of the plane in degrees as measured in a clockwise fashion from the positive y -axis in the range [0,360]

keywords.name: wall.generate.plane.position
keywords.description: Position of a point on the plane

keywords.name: wall.generate.point
keywords.description: Generate a point wall

keywords.name: wall.generate.point.resolution
keywords.description: Resolution of the point wall

keywords.name: wall.generate.polygon
keywords.description: Generate a planar, polygonal wall in 3D

keywords.name: wall.generate.sphere
keywords.description: Generate a closed sphere wall in 3D

keywords.name: wall.generate.sphere.radius
keywords.description: Radius of the sphere that is 1

keywords.name: wall.generate.sphere.resolution
keywords.description: Resolution of the facet edges

examples.command: new domain extent - 10 10 wall generate ... group spheres ... sphere position 5.0 0.0 - 2.0 ... radius 3.0 ... resolution 1 wall generate ... group spheres ... sphere position - 5.0 0.0 - 2.0 ... radius 3.0 ... resolution 0.1

new domain extent - 20 20 wall generate ... group cones ... cone ... axis 1 0 1 ... base - 12.0 0.0 0 ... cap true true ... height 10.0 ... onewall ... radius 5.0 3.0 ... resolution 1 wall generate ... group cones ... cone ... axis - 1 0 1 ... base 12.0 0.0 0 ... cap false false ... height 10.0 ... onewall ... radius 5.0 3.0 ... resolution 0.1
